steps.t: Mêshaget promised to explain what is going on when you meet at the top of the great staircase at Lâkindar's entrance. Lâkindar is located far to the s…
You have travelled to Lâkindar and found Mêshaget waiting for you. You should talk to him.
Mêshaget wants to ensure neither of you were followed here. You should enter the Quelling-house and assess the situation.
You have cleared a path in the Quelling-house and have yet to see Mêshaget. You should search for the tomb of Semayâti the Unyielding.
Following a confrontation with Sâdikiz the Sky-hungry and his Ordâkhai allies, you have helped an injured Mêshaget return to Jiret-menêsh where you we…
Châmelek Gêta is at once furious with you both but also awestruck at having the journal of Semayâti the Unyielding handed to her. She demands Mêshaget…
Mêshaget has pleaded his case with Châmelek Gêta as well as he could, asking only that she take the time to review the journal and consider the option…
Châmelek Gêta agreed to examine the plans in the journal and discuss the situation with Mêshaget after she has done so. You should talk to Mêshaget in…
